winners.title: Argus- It never forgets
winners.tagline: Data is gold, but stays passive in chats. Argus is a proactive Gemini 3 agent that connects past WhatsApp chats to present browsing, injecting context when you need it. Argus: It never forgets
winners.hackathon_title: Airia AI Agents Hackathon

winners.title: Drift Detect
winners.tagline: Catch scope creep before it costs you.
winners.hackathon_title: Airia AI Agents Hackathon

winners.title: Knight AI
winners.tagline: See something suspicious? Knight AI instantly analyses websites, emails, and social media for phishing and scams, flags the threat, explains why it's dangerous, and tells you exactly what to do.
winners.hackathon_title: Airia AI Agents Hackathon

winners.title: Guardian — AI-Governed Incident Response
winners.tagline: 5-node autonomous pipeline: triages P1 alerts, fetches runbooks, gets HITL approval, spins up war rooms, and auto-generates DORA/SOX post-mortems — all in under 12 seconds.
winners.hackathon_title: Airia AI Agents Hackathon

winners.title: FlightGuard: AI Mission Planner
winners.tagline: Enterprise AI orchestrator for drone missions. Uses Airia MCPs for live weather & airspace intel, enforcing Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Commander approval for secure, compliant flight deployments.
winners.hackathon_title: Airia AI Agents Hackathon

winners.title: ComplianceGuard
winners.tagline: Autonomous AI compliance monitoring — detect GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2 & EU AI Act violations in 60 seconds
winners.hackathon_title: Airia AI Agents Hackathon

winners.title: SEND (Strategic Economic Node Development)
winners.tagline: SEND (Strategic Economic Node Development) is a visual, node-based platform that teaches users how trading strategies actually work through drag-and-drop nodes.
winners.hackathon_title: Hackonomics 2026

winners.title: My ET - Economic Times Reimagined
winners.tagline: AI-powered financial news assistant that translates complex articles into any language, verifies facts to stop fake news. Making financial knowledge accessible to everyone
winners.hackathon_title: Hackonomics 2026

winners.title: Koda Finance
winners.tagline: An agentic AI cross-platform finance app that helps users track spending and set goals with smart account types for teens, adults, and parents.
winners.hackathon_title: Hackonomics 2026

winners.title: BLK Exchange (BLKx)
winners.tagline: Trade 36 Black-economy companies. Real cultural news moves the market. AI teaches 23 investing concepts through gameplay. Free. Built in one week with Claude Code by a Howard grad who can't code.
winners.hackathon_title: Hackonomics 2026

winners.title: Rent vs. Buy Simulator
winners.tagline: A fully accessible financial simulation. This app helps users determine the true opportunity cost of renting versus buying a home by calculating compound interest etc... over a customizable timeline.
winners.hackathon_title: Hackonomics 2026

winners.title: EconoQuest
winners.tagline: Govern a nation. Live with the consequences.
winners.hackathon_title: Hackonomics 2026

winners.title: Apex Terminal
winners.tagline: A deterministic trading terminal where Autopilot, Backtesting, Workflows, and Global Search are fully auditable and replayable, with proof-pack test evidence and offline verifiable exports.
winners.hackathon_title: Hackonomics 2026

winners.title: Antrum MK 1
winners.tagline: Lost underground? No GPS, no signal. Our handheld devices track each other using motion sensors and radio; giving cavers a live compass pointing straight to their partner. No infrastructure needed.
